incident_types.Fire: fire in refuse chute or carpark, electrical riser fire, F&B podium kitchen fire, smoke detector activation, sprinkler discharge
incident_types.Hazmat: refrigerant leak in the chiller plant, chemical spill at the loading bay, fumes in the basement, hazmat release
incident_types.Bomb threat / suspicious item: bomb threat phone call, suspicious package or unattended bag in the lobby, threatening note
incident_types.Power failure / lift entrapment: power outage, genset failure, lift entrapment with trapped occupants, water leak into an electrical riser
